description_long: This is a young adult male standing upright, dressed in casual urban attire suitable for city environments. He wears a hooded sweatshirt with a front pocket and a visible blue geometric logo on the back, paired with fitted pants and low-top sneakers. His hands are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and his posture is natural and balanced. The figure's hair is short and styled with a side part, giving a neat and contemporary appearance. The clothing appears to be made from typical fabric materials, while the shoes have a rubber-like sole. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall look is modern and approachable.
description: A casually dressed young adult male in a hoodie, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded sweatshirt, relaxed arms, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, hood, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded sweatshirt with a blue geometric logo and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hood, and the relaxed hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and fitted pants
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a side part
